title: [MTR4+JCM] Korea PIDS Pack
description: This resource pack adds PIDS from South Korea to Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This resource pack adds a variety of PIDS from South Korea to Minecraft Transit Railway 4. All PIDS in this resource pack are in English by default. To change the language, insert a "k" (Korean) or a "b" (bilingual) into the first custom arrival text box.

Requires Minecraft Transit Railway v4.x.x and Joban Client Mod v2.x.x.

## List of included PIDS
- Metro LCD PIDS (old - blue background)
- Metro LCD PIDS (new - black background)
- Metro LED PIDS (old - GaP LEDs)
- Metro LED PIDS (new - InGaN LEDs)
- Metro Line 9 PIDS
- GTX-A PIDS
- Seoul city bus PIDS
- Incheon Metro PIDS
- Seoul city bus PIDS (new variant)
- Seoul city bus PIDS (large variant)
- Busan Metro PIDS
- Korail station PIDS
- Seoul Metro PSD display (old - GaP LEDs, see gallery for instructions)
- Seoul Metro PSD display (new - InGaN LEDs, see gallery for instructions)
- Seoul Metro PSD display (line 4 variant, see gallery for instructions)
